items.text: · K9 Rip, currently PSP’s only bloodhound, has assisted with many cases since August. K9 Rip and handler Trooper Petrof have successfully tracked people and discovered evidence across miles of terrain, including dozens of missing or endangered persons and criminal suspects.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 12 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Selwyn Forrester was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· May 12 In honor of #NationalPoliceWeek, please join us in thanking all our law enforcement brothers and sisters who have dedicated their lives to keeping our communities safe by serving, protecting, and upholding the law.

· May 11 Free car seat checks are underway across PA! Our certified technicians inspect child passenger safety seats for suitability, check for recalls, and perform installations. Find an event near you, from May 11-31, at http:// bit.ly/PSPchildseat.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 10 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Leehsia Reeves was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.
